title: Love and Run
original_title: มิสเตอร์ดื้อ กันท่าเหรียญทอง
overview: A country boy has grown up with his father and his auntie. He is always overprotective for his auntie. Whoever dares to flirt with Lin, he will chase them away, causing troubles for her auntie who dreams of having a good boyfriend.
